title: TENANT EVICTION DEFENSE - 211info
text: THE COMMONS LAW CENTER TENANT EVICTION DEFENSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides tenants with brief advice, helps negotiate agreements with their landlord's lawyers, and facilitates rental assistance applications. Also offers in-person eviction defense for tenants with an eviction court case during the morning docket at Multnomah and East County Courthouses. Eligibility: Below 400% of the federal poverty level. Most services are limited to tenants served at the Multnomah County Courthouse clinic during the first appearance of their eviction case but citizenship and legal residency are not required. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm In-Person Eviction Court Defense at the following locations: Multnomah County Courthouse 1200 SW 1st Avenue, Portland, OR 97204, Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-noon East County Courthouse 18480 SE Stark Street, Portland, OR 97233, Wednesday 8am-noon Email (503) 850-0811 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 850-0811 Main phone Main phone (503) 850-0811 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, email, or visit website for more information In-Person Eviction Court Defense: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Eviction notice, court paperwork, lease, and proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tenants rights information: State of Oregon Court representation: Multnomah County Services: Eviction Prevention Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - GUARDIANSHIP AND CONSERVATORSHIP HELP LEGAL SERVICES - LEGAL HELP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE COMMONS LAW CENTER
